entries.title: COMMENTARY ON THE PROVERBS OF SOLOMON, FRAGMENT 16:16 on proverbs 16:16
entries.excerpt: As gold is better than silver, so wisdom is superior to prudence. The former pertains to knowledge, the latter to the interpretation of what is hidden. Either you can interpret the nests of wisdom as the churches or as the dwelling places of the holy ones in heaven. But wisdom itself is Christ.
